commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 21:15 And you shall have great sickness by disease of your intestines, until your intestines come out because of the sickness day by day. Hebrew, "by reason of the sickness, (Haydock) day by day "or in two years time, ver. (Calmet) He was probably ill so long. (Haydock) Agrippa and Antiochus were treated in the same manner, (Calmet) with a diarrhoea, (Menochius) or dysentery, (Calmet) the vitals being corrupted. (Valesius 40.
